title: Operator Hosted Collection Manifest
description: Format for a shareable, hostable issuetype collection (collection.json). A collection references per-issuetype schema files (issuetype_schema.json format) by relative path, each with a SHA-256 checksum. This same format is used for the offline collections embedded in the operator binary.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Unknown versions are rejected by the fetcher (offline fallback used).

author.description: Human author/attribution shown in the setup picker. Built-ins are authored by 'Operator!'; a kanban-imported collection lists the provider name + workspace/project.

url.description: Link to the collection's source (GitHub repo or project page).

operator_version.description: Minimum operator version this collection targets (e.g. >=0.2.0).

issue_types.description: Issue types in this collection, in display order.

schema_path.description: Path to the issuetype JSON, relative to the manifest.

schema_checksum.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) of the issuetype JSON bytes. Required for hosted manifests; omitted for embedded ones.

template_path.description: Optional path to the markdown template, relative to the manifest.

template_checksum.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) of the markdown template bytes, if present.

workflow_hints.description: Descriptive metadata about the collection's intended agentic loop shape. v1 is metadata only: stored and displayed but not executed.

runner_semantics.description: How the runner interprets the hints. v1 is always prompt_driven.

default_selected.description: Subset of issue_types[].key selected by default in the setup picker.

checksum.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) derived from the issue-type file checksums (schema_checksum + template_checksum joined by newlines, in issue_types order).
